name: Alliance Bank
description_short: Community bank serving Western Wisconsin with four locations offering checking, savings, loans, and investment services to agricultural and business customers.
description_long:
Alliance Bank is a regional community bank based in Western Wisconsin, operating since at least the time this profile was created. The bank maintains four physical branch locations in Mondovi, Osseo, Cochrane, and Bluff Siding, serving primarily agricultural and business banking needs in the region. The bank holds routing number 091803355 and provides traditional banking infrastructure to rural Wisconsin communities.

Alliance Bank offers a standard suite of retail banking products including checking accounts, savings accounts, personal and business loans, certificate of deposit (CD) products, and investment services. The bank advertises competitive rates and provides digital banking access through 24-hour telephone and internet banking platforms. They partner with Shazam for debit card processing and the Brella App for digital card management, allowing customers to suspend cards immediately if needed. The bank also manages investment products tailored to individual customer goals.

What distinguishes Alliance Bank is its hyperlocal focus on agricultural and business banking in Western Wisconsin, with particular emphasis on serving graduating high school seniors through annual $1,000 scholarship programs from five regional high schools. The bank operates the "AB Perks" loyalty program and maintains accessibility features for low-vision users on their website. Their small footprint of four branches allows for personalized service and relationship banking.

As a small regional bank, Alliance Bank's primary limitation is geographic reach—customers are restricted to Western Wisconsin locations only. The website provides minimal detail on specific loan products, rates, or account fee structures, requiring customers to contact branches directly for detailed information. There is no indication of FDIC insurance messaging, mobile app details, or comprehensive digital banking features beyond basic internet and phone banking.
services: Checking accounts with multiple account options
Debit card services via Shazam network
Digital card management through Brella App
Lost or stolen debit card services
pros: Four conveniently located branches in Mondovi, Osseo, Cochrane, and Bluff Siding serving Western Wisconsin communities
24-hour telephone and internet banking access for existing account holders
Partnership with Shazam for debit card processing with immediate card suspension capability via Brella App
Annual $1,000 scholarship program for graduating seniors from five local high schools (Mondovi, C-FC, Osseo-Fairchild, Eleva-Strum, Gilmanton)
Full-service investment products and services available for wealth management and retirement planning
Specialized focus on agricultural and business banking needs specific to rural Wisconsin economy
AB Perks loyalty program offering benefits to customers
cons: Limited to four physical locations in Western Wisconsin with no national or online-only banking presence
Website lacks specific information on account fees, minimum balance requirements, and interest rate details
No mention of mobile banking app, only basic telephone and internet banking options available
Minimal transparency about loan products, terms, APRs, or lending criteria on public website
No FDIC insurance messaging or deposit protection information visible on primary pages

contact.address: 245 S Eau Claire St, Mondovi, WI 54755

best_for: Agricultural businesses and farmers in Western Wisconsin seeking relationship banking and specialized ag lending
Small business owners in the Mondovi, Osseo, Cochrane, and Bluff Siding areas needing local banking support
High school graduates from five regional schools seeking educational funding through their scholarship program
Local residents seeking traditional community bank services with in-person branch access
diagnosis: Alliance Bank is best for agricultural producers, small business owners, and local residents in Western Wisconsin who value personalized relationship banking and prefer dealing with local branch staff. The primary caveat is geographic limitation—this bank only serves four rural Wisconsin locations, making it unsuitable for customers outside this region or those seeking modern digital banking features like a dedicated mobile app.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 245 S Eau Claire St, Mondovi, WI 54755
